{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220408572C01EBFE2559E4D660AD"}"},"total":3279},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7146932238486881035","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"说真的，对于这种类型的书，我基本上已经看过很多，大概的剧情我都可以猜得到，但是这本书还是有些不同的，很多地方的创新，尤其是接近于现实这方面，可以说是真的很符合常理，很多地方可以看出，作者真的用心思考了，不过前期还是比较慢热的，总之作者加油！我很喜欢你的书！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1664024946,"group_id":"7119319612071611423","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"赌局开始，愿赌服输，输赢不定，生死不论","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4zaoJ1149BfkuHfIUvA0kGU2hK4I3PpsSv0+521tfhn","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/04425709299b46c88e40e07d06a50977~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701950&x-signature=xX1OyUVO1rF2b2EoL8z%2BJ%2FTkYO8%3D","user_id":"3747588688853694","user_name":"迁与客"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3747588688853694","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1649465841,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7119319612071611423","book_info":{"abstract":"游戏策划顾哲穿越到了一个邪恶种族肆虐的末世。
死灵、恶魔、暗精灵、血族、虫蛇等各类邪恶种族......
末世的人类，已经被邪恶种族灭杀！
身为人类的顾哲同样危在旦夕！
好在，顾哲把自己策划的游戏一同带了过来。
通过这款游戏，他可以召唤蓝星上的玩家降临这个世界！

"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":62,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":3057,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10015,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":17252},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7215973221056201475","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好的书了。虽然看着可能有点憋屈。但是开头也说了原因。真实游戏。不喜欢的人的原因估计都是游戏进程太快的原因。进程慢主角可以依靠亡灵法师刷怪抢等级。但是进程太快。会显的主角很懦弱。各种淘。其实应该来个不能代练级的顶级战斗npc的。可以系统抽奖可以礼包。总能找个借口给主角开开挂的。不过困难归困难。这本书还是能让人有看下去的欲望的。看下去主角总会强起来。总的来说。是本不错的书了。","text_exts":[{"e":67,"s":63,"text":"亡灵法师","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%BA%A1%E7%81%B5%E6%B3%95%E5%B8%88&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774123737E4D660AD%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227215973221056201475%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227119319612071611423%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%BA%A1%E7%81%B5%E6%B3%95%E5%B8%88%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1680099829,"group_id":"7119319612071611423","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"日更十万。卷死同行。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+Oyqf08HxBQRNTT6WkTAWY=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/274b664952454f7fbe535c3584ae3867~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702097&x-signature=25fFcOxOQiMQNepj4ir0x5kNo94%3D","user_id":"3999496117","user_name":"纳西坦的狗"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3999496117","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":f
